channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Early detection of cerebral palsy improves children’s development outcomes, say experts
item.description: Health experts in Tanzania are calling on parents and caregivers to pay close attention to early developmental signs in young children to help detect cerebral palsy (CP) as early as possible. Cerebral...

item.title: HDFC Bank Chairman Atanu Chakraborty Resigns Abruptly; Investors Seek Clarity
item.description: On Wednesday night, HDFC Bank chairman Atanu Chakraborty resigned unexpectedly, citing discrepancies between his personal values and certain practices within the bank. This sudden move left investors ...

item.title: Daylight saving ends 5 April 2026: how clocks change and what it means for Australians
item.description: Daylight saving will end early on Sunday 5 April 2026 at 3am Australian eastern daylight time (AEDT) in New South Wales, Victoria, South Australia, Tasmania and the Australian Capital Territory. At th...

item.description: This article provides a comprehensive horoscope for all twelve zodiac signs for March 20, 2026, authored by Sally Brompton for The Globe and Mail. It begins with guidance for those celebrating their b...

item.description: Filipino tennis sensation Alex Eala recently celebrated a significant victory in Miami, and in a heartfelt interview, she shared her reflections on the process. Eala emphasized the importance of patie...

item.title: PTI leaders, family denied meeting with Imran Khan at Adiala Jail; CM Afridi appeals for Eid visit
item.description: In a concerning development, leaders of Pakistan Tehreek-e-Insaf (PTI) were once again denied permission to meet their party founder, former Prime Minister Imran Khan, at Adiala Jail. Advocate Niazull...

item.title: TMC booth chief found murdered in North 24 Parganas, Bengal
item.description: In a tragic incident at Minakhan in North 24 Parganas, West Bengal, a 38-year-old Trinamool Congress (TMC) booth chief, Kazi Masiur Rahman, was discovered dead on Thursday. His body, showing signs of ...

item.description: Israel announced it will cease targeting Iranian energy infrastructure after an Israeli strike on a gas field prompted retaliatory attacks across the Middle East, spiking oil and gas prices. The move ...

item.description: In Gilgit, Pakistan Customs, along with Military Intelligence and local police, successfully foiled an attempt to smuggle high-end mobile phones from China via Khunjerab Pass. During the operation, au...

item.description: Israel launched a new wave of attacks on Iranian targets, specifically the South Pars gas field, despite US president Donald Trump requesting that such strikes be avoided. Israeli Prime Minister Benja...

item.title: Canberra Hosts 37th Annual Model Railway Expo in Kaleen

item.title: High Court Temporarily Lifts Suspension on MP Anthony Kibagendi
item.description: Nairobi — The High Court has temporarily allowed Kitutu Chache South MP Anthony Kibagendi to return to Parliament after he was suspended by National Assembly Speaker Moses Wetang'ula. Justice Bahati M...

item.title: Labor MP raises concerns over humanitarian visa applications and migration lawyer conduct
item.description: Labor MP Julian Hill has criticised migration lawyers who handle humanitarian refugee cases with little or no chance of success, calling some of their conduct 'bordering on unconscionable'. Hill, the ...

item.title: Kenyan Man Returns Safely from Russia–Ukraine War After Months Away

item.title: Kenya Meteorological Department Issues Flood and Landslide Warnings Across Several Counties
item.description: On Friday, March 20, Kenyan dailies highlighted alerts from the Kenya Meteorological Department (KMD) regarding heavy rains triggering floods and landslides in various parts of the country. Residents ...
